limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No dollar amounts, headcount figures, or named vendor/infrastructure partnerships disclosed; 'invested significantly' is unquantified and primarily refers to employee training, not capital infrastructure.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named use cases are not described beyond 'select applications'; no deployment metrics or operational detail provided; score of 3 reflects named initiative (employee AI skills program) and general operational use, but no production detail.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and names specific risk categories (model errors/deficiency, regulatory risk, cybersecurity, competitive disadvantage), but no quantification or named governance/oversight bodies are disclosed, capping score at 3.
